jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Radiologist at AIIMS Delhi
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at AIIMS Delhi. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Radiologist to strengthen our Jodhpur-based team.

About AIIMS Delhi:
AIIMS Delhi is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Clinical Research

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Referral bonus program
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with AIIMS Delhi!
